name: My Future Training — Full-Stack Web & Mobile Developer (Freelance)
description: My Future Training is an all-in-one application designed for sports coaches. As a freelance full-stack web and mobile developer (September 2019 – January 2022), I implemented the entire technical stack: an API, a single-page application, a cross-platform mobile application and a showcase site, including payment solutions (Stripe API and App Store Server API) to manage subscriptions, and established regular deployment rules.
